game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Stardew Valley Stardew Valley is an open-ended farming and life simulation RPG where players restore a dilapidated farm, engaging in activities like planting crops, raising livestock, fishing, mining, and interacting with townspeople. The game operates on a daily and seasonal cycle affecting gameplay, requiring players to manage energy and health, utilize tools, and craft items, while skill levels (farming, mining, etc.) improve over time, unlocking new recipes and abilities.
game_info.description: Welcome to Harvest Haven! You've inherited a small farm that needs restoration. Plant and harvest crops, manage your energy throughout the day, and build up your farming skills. Each day cycle lasts 60 seconds - use your time wisely! Plant seeds, water crops, harvest when ready, and sell your produce to earn gold. Upgrade your skills and unlock new crops as you progress. Watch your energy meter and return home before nightfall to rest for the next day!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the farm
Z: Plant seeds (costs gold and energy, requires tilled soil)
X: Water crops (costs energy, makes crops grow faster)
C: Harvest mature crops (grants gold and experience)
Space: Till soil to prepare for planting (costs energy)
Shift: Open/close shop to buy seeds
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic farming mechanics and energy management. This test verifies that the player can till soil, plant seeds, water crops, and harvest them successfully. It also tests that energy depletes correctly and the day/night cycle functions properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will till multiple soil patches near the starting position, plant seeds in them, water the crops consistently, and harvest them when mature. It will manage energy by avoiding actions when energy is too low and will return to the farmhouse to sleep when night approaches or energy runs out.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI completes at least 2-3 full farming cycles (till, plant, water, harvest) across multiple days. The player should gain gold from selling crops, level up farming skills, and properly manage the day/night cycle without running out of energy at critical moments.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal farming strategy to maximize gold and experience gain. This test aims to achieve high scores by efficiently using time, energy, and resources. It tests the progression system, crop varieties, and economic balance of the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will focus on planting high-value crops in organized rows, watering them optimally to reduce growth time, and harvesting efficiently. It will purchase seeds strategically, manage energy to maximize farming actions per day, and prioritize activities that give the most gold and experience. The AI will plant as many crops as possible while maintaining enough energy to complete full cycles.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when the AI reaches at least Level 3 in farming skills and accumulates over 500 gold within 5 in-game days. The farm should have multiple mature crops ready for harvest, demonstrating efficient resource management and strategic planning. The AI should show consistent progression in skills and wealth.
